title: agelanthus djurensis
intro: Agelanthus djurensis, also known as the "Corky Bush," is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Agelanthus djurensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal dosage.
